finding_results.notes: Kept the one earned contrastive pair at line 89 and replaced the later recurrence with direct statement so the chapter no longer repeats the same abstract template.

Audited the full chapter and replaced habitual hand/palm/finger defaults with body-position, wound, and object-specific phrasing. Post-revision audit leaves one remaining finger reference, tied to the signet.
Chapter 13 now stays internally consistent with the continuity sheet's canonical value by keeping every on-page Vel reference at eighteen.
finding_results.revision_note: The missing reader-visible one-level spend that makes Vel's drop from 20 to 18 fully traceable occurs before this chapter. Because this pass can only revise chapter_13.md, I preserved the canonical Ch13 count and avoided introducing a conflicting 19-level trail, but the complete public arithmetic still depends on Chapter 12 surfacing that earlier spend.

summary: Reduced Chapter 13's recurring 'shape of ...' construction to the single earned contrastive beat, cut hand/palm/finger density from 42 references to 1, and kept all Chapter 13 Vel-level references aligned to the continuity sheet's canonical 18 while noting the remaining cross-chapter visibility dependency.
